title: AG47 to AG56 Governing Stage Plan

stages.title: Panchang, Festival and Vedic Guidance Implementation Readiness
stages.objective: Consume existing methodology/governance and prepare safe V01 public preview integration.

substages.primary_work: Panchang Method and Location Basis Consumption
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Confirm method boundary and disabled live calculation status.
Prepare public preview display rules and regional/manual verification notes.

substages.primary_work: Vedic Guidance and Sanskrit Integrity Safety Gate
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Preserve no invented mantra, no deterministic claim and source-integrity rules.
Audit homepage Discover integration and safety boundaries.
Close V01 implementation readiness without live calculation/API activation.

stages.title: Word of the Day and Reflection Implementation Readiness
stages.objective: Consume existing Word bank and reflection/governance logic for V01 homepage integration.

substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Confirm curated bank, approved status, rotation policy and repeat control.
Check Sanskrit/Hindi/English meanings, transliteration and no toggle corruption.
Map word/reflection to Discover/Reflect surface without personalisation activation.
Audit integration; no external API, Supabase, Auth or dynamic runtime activation.
Close V01 readiness and hand off to user/personalisation readiness.

stages.title: User Accounts and Personalisation Readiness
stages.objective: Preserve future personalisation path while keeping V01 static/GitHub-first and privacy-safe.

substages.primary_work: User/Profile Model Consumption and Gap Review
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Review future fields and disabled-now states.

substages.primary_work: Consent, Entitlement and Sensitive Data Gate
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Preserve explicit consent, secure storage requirement and blocked birth-detail collection.
Confirm no hidden backend activation; list future trigger conditions.
Audit privacy, consent, storage, public exposure and non-deterministic guidance boundaries.
Close V01 readiness; keep personalised output disabled unless separately approved.

stages.title: Psychometric and Assessment Product Governance Scaffold
stages.objective: Document assessment product scaffold/governance only; do not activate public assessment in V01.

substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Define non-diagnostic, consent-first, age-adaptive boundaries.
Define fields, trait dimensions, review status and contradiction flags without launching runtime.
Define score/confidence/contradiction/human review logic; no deterministic labels.
Audit minors, consent, sensitive inference, data minimisation and disclaimer needs.
Close V01 scaffold; defer real assessment product to V02 unless separately approved.

stages.title: Analytics, Monitoring and Editorial Dashboard Planning
stages.objective: Define monitoring and dashboards for editorial/module health without enabling runtime queries.

substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Define panels for queue, assignments, returned items, references and image credits.
Define metrics for topic score, First Light, episode, Featured Reads, Panchang, Word and listing status.
Define broken URL, missing reference/credit, layout, role, audit and rollback exceptions.
Audit dashboard plan; no runtime dashboard, database query or monitoring job.
Close dashboard planning and hand off to security/privacy/legal hardening.

stages.title: Security, Privacy, Source, Legal and Compliance Hardening
stages.objective: Consolidate secret safety, source doctrine, legal disclaimers, privacy and backend/Auth deferral.

substages.primary_work: Secret, Environment and Service-role Safety Audit
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Audit repo/browser/public config for service-role, secrets and unsafe env leakage.

substages.primary_work: RLS, Grants and Public Exposure Audit
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Review public exposure and maintain no unintended anon access.

substages.primary_work: Source, Reference, Image Credit and Disclaimer Readiness
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Prepare editorial/source/image/Vedic/psychometric/privacy disclaimers.
Audit combined security/legal/privacy posture and backend deferral.
Close compliance hardening before public QA.

stages.title: Performance, SEO, Accessibility and Mobile QA
stages.objective: Validate public quality and discoverability for V01 surfaces.

substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Review page size, image load, JS/CSS load and mobile speed risks.

substages.primary_work: SEO Metadata, Sitemap and Robots Review
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Review titles, descriptions, OG/canonical, sitemap, robots and article URL correctness.
Check responsive layout, alt text readiness, contrast, tap targets and table/figure safety.

substages.primary_work: Public UX and Browser Compatibility Audit
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Audit Chrome/Safari/mobile route behaviour, navigation and language stability.
Close public quality readiness and hand off to release operations.

stages.title: Backup, Rollback, Migration and Release Operations
stages.objective: Create operational safety before V01 release candidate freeze.

substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Define repo/content/static artifact backup and restore method.
Define validate, git status, commit, push, Vercel/live check sequence.
Define triggers and action path for homepage, article, listing, privacy or route breakage.
Audit backup, release, rollback and incident response readiness.
Close operational readiness before release candidate freeze.

stages.title: Version 01 Release Candidate Freeze, Completed-Stack Reconciliation and Final Audit
stages.objective: Freeze V01 scope and reconcile every completed repo stream before AG56.

substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Freeze included modules and explicitly defer V02 items.

substages.primary_work: Completed Repo Stack and Dependency Reconciliation
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Verify completed streams are consumed; resolve old roadmap conflicts including AG41Z → AG42A pointer.
Validate V01 as a whole: homepage, articles, First Light, episodes, Word, Panchang, security and release ops.
Confirm AG56 controlled dynamic content-loop can be attempted only with explicit approval.
Close V01 RC and permit AG56 controlled dynamic test path.

stages.title: Version 01 Controlled Dynamic Content Loop Test and Go-Live
stages.objective: Run one controlled end-to-end V01 content loop, then decide go-live.

substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Select one signal/topic, apply scoring, prepare one article/episode candidate with refs and credit status.
Test editor correction/submit path and Admin final approval.

substages.primary_work: Controlled Publish Test for One Article
substages.delta_output_no_duplicate_rule: Publish one article only after explicit approval, with audit and rollback readiness.
Verify live URL, content, references, image credits, category and listing update.
Verify First Light/Featured Reads/episode cards and Discover → Read → Reflect flow.
Smoke-test preview surfaces without invented mantra, unsupported claims or language instability.
Confirm action audit, before/after status, rollback reference and public verification evidence.
Decide go/no-go based on controlled test result and unresolved blockers.
Declare Drishvara V01 live or deferred with explicit defect list; V02 remains separate scaffolded expansion.
